summary: Plan-only live PR inventory classification. No shared canonical was selected because the job is an inventory shard, not a dedupe cluster. Four PRs are kept independent; #91510 is routed to central security handling per deterministic validation. No GitHub mutations are planned.

actions.reason: Maintainer-owned draft PR is active work and not a duplicate, superseded, low-signal, or security-sensitive item in this inventory shard.

The PR appears to be a focused independent Telegram fix awaiting maintainer review; partial PR enrichment gaps block closure or merge-style planning but do not make it a duplicate or low-signal close candidate.

Focused contributor bug-fix PR with supplied proof and green checks should remain as an independent maintainer-review candidate; merge is blocked by job frontmatter and no duplicate/supersession evidence is present.

Large but coherent contributor feature/fix PR is an independent maintainer-review candidate with compatibility and session-state risk labels; it is not closable as duplicate, superseded, low-signal, or fixed by another hydrated candidate in this inventory shard.
Validator identifies this exact PR as security-sensitive, so ProjectClownfish must quarantine #91510 with a non-mutating route_security action rather than needs_human or backlog classification.
